_meta.name: diagnostic_vpc
external_method_references: Karlsson MO, Holford N (2008) A tutorial on visual predictive checks.
Bergstrand M, Hooker AC, Wallin JE, Karlsson MO (2011) Prediction-corrected visual predictive checks for diagnosing nonlinear mixed-effects models.
_meta.notes: Self-consistent openpkpd regression baseline enriched with literature-backed VPC expectations for coverage and misspecification sensitivity. Useful for drift detection, but not yet a published-dataset or cross-software parity reference.
